---
title: "proxy.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/vis/proxy.ts"
loc: 114
complexity: 13
logic_score: 3.42
style_score: 3.96
intel_score: 5.16
overall_score: 3.76
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.2/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 11 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)

## ⛩️ API Gateways
- `[GET] /api/matrix`
- `[GET] /api/gravity`
- `[GET] /api/config`
- `[POST] /api/telemetry/ping`
- `[POST] /api/telemetry/trace`
- `[GET] /api/matrix/trajectories`


## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://fastify)
- [*](file://@fastify/static)
- [*](file://@fastify/cors)
- [WebSocketServer](file://ws)
- [WebSocket](file://ws)
- [*](file://node:path)
- [*](file://node:fs)
- [*](file://chalk)
- [registry](file://../pathRegistry.js)
- [activePersona](file://../personaRegistry.js)
- [fileURLToPath](file://node:url)
- [*](file://node:crypto)
- [savePing](file://../intel/database.js)
- [saveTrace](file://../intel/database.js)
- [getTracesForFile](file://../intel/database.js)

### Exports
- `startProxy`
- `startProxy`
- `server`
- `statsDir`
- `token`
- `__filename`
- `__dirname`
- `distDir`
- `url`
- `queryToken`
- `authHeader`
- `wss`
- `clients`
- `signalFile`
- `signal`
- `message`
- `graphPath`
- `graphData`
- `gravityPath`
- `gravityData`
- `filePath`
- `traces`
- `url`
